Sorry Seems To Be The Hardest Word

content:
This is my second tab, so bear with me if I goofed.
Thought some of you may like this old high school music.
Blessings and Peace!


Survivor-- I can't hold back

[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
There's a story in my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Turn the pages of desire[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
now its time to trade those dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
for the rush of passions fire[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch]
I can feel you tremble when we touch[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
and I feel the hand of fate[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
reaching out to both of us.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
I've been holding back the night.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I've been searching for a clue from you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I'm gonna try with all my might[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
to make this story line come true.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
Can you feel me tremble when we touch?[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Can you feel the hand of fate[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
reaching out to both of us?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
This love affair can't wait.[/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I can't hold back,  I'm on the edge...(I can't hold back)[/tab]

Your voice explodes inside my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
I can't hold back, I won't back down.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]

(Interlude)

Another shooting star goes by[/tab]
